products.name: Spot Correcting Serum
products.description:
Bright, Even, and Calm Skin in Every Drop

Your skin deserves more than promises. Radiate is a clinically-formulated brightening serum that actually works — fading dark spots, calming sensitivity, and giving your skin a smooth, healthy glow without irritation.

Why It Works

Every ingredient in Radiate is selected for performance and gentleness. Nothing unnecessary, nothing harsh.

  • Niacinamide (5%) – evens tone, reduces dullness, strengthens your skin barrier.

  • Alpha Arbutin (3%) – targets dark spots and pigmentation for visibly clearer skin.

  • Panthenol (Pro-Vitamin B5, 3%) – hydrates deeply while calming redness and inflammation.

  • Madecassoside (0.3%) – the active compound from Centella Asiatica that speeds up repair and soothes irritation.

  • Beta-Glucan & Hyaluronic Acid – provide that instant plump, smooth feeling.

  • Glycerin – keeps hydration locked in, ensuring comfort even for sensitive skin.

Feels Like:

A light, water-based texture that absorbs instantly. No stickiness, no residue.

Perfect under sunscreen or moisturizer, even in humid Bangladeshi weather.

Who It’s For:

  • Uneven tone or dark spots

  • Dull, tired skin

  • Redness or sensitivity

  • Those who want a visible glow without strong actives or acids

Note: During pregnancy, use 3 times/week max. Also, if used in the morning, SPF is a must.

Real Results

In customer testing, most users noticed:

  • Brighter tone within 2 weeks

  • Visible reduction in dark spots by week 4

  • Calmer, smoother skin feel immediately after use

products.name: DermoQore Spot Correcting Serum Combo 2 Pcs
products.shortDescription: ক্লিনিক্যাল ফর্মুলেশনে ব্রনের যে কোন দাগ, ডার্ক স্পট, হাইপারপিগমেন্টেশন আর মেছতাকে দূর করে স্কিনকে করুন আরো উজ্জ্বল।
products.description: ব্রনের যে কোন দাগ, ডার্ক স্পট, হাইপারপিগমেন্টেশন, মেছতা, ডালনেস দূর করার বিজ্ঞানভিত্তিক স্থায়ী সমাধান আছে। আমাদের ক্লিনিক্যালি প্রুভেন এই প্রোডাক্টটি নিয়মিত রুলস ফলো করে ব্যবহার করলে আপনার সমস্যা সমাধান হতে পারে। বিজ্ঞানভিত্তিক সমাধান মিথ্যা প্রতিশ্রুতি নয়, বরং রেজাল্টের উপর নির্ভর করে।

ingredients.name: Aqua (Water), Niacinamide, Panthenol, Alpha-Arbutin, Beta-Glucan, Madecassoside, Glycerin, Sodium Hyaluronate, Disodium EDTA, Caprylyl Glycol, Diazolidinyl Urea (and) Iodopropynyl Butylcarbamate [Germall Plus], Citric Acid, Sodium Hydroxide.

productUsages.content: Apply to a clean face and neck morning and night. Gently massage until it's set on the skin. SPF is must if used during day-time.

productSEOs.metaDescription: ক্লিনিক্যাল ফর্মুলেশনে ব্রনের যে কোন দাগ, ডার্ক স্পট, হাইপারপিগমেন্টেশন আর মেছতাকে দূর করে স্কিনকে করুন আরো উজ্জ্বল।

blogs.title: Born in Bangladesh, Built for Everyone: The Celeste Story
blogs.content: {"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Nowadays, skincare has become an important part of daily life. People are more aware of the health of their skin than ever before. It is very difficult to maintain a consistent skincare routine for ordinary people. "}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Because of high prices, complex rules, routines, and imported products. In Bangladesh, skincare often remains a luxury rather than a necessity. If you walk through any market or browse online stores of skincare products in Bangladesh. You will feel this scenario very well."}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Yet the reality is simple. Everyone lives under the same sun. Everyone faces dust, pollution, and humidity. Everyone deserves healthy skin and the confidence that comes with it."}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"What if quality skincare could be affordable skincare for everyone? Not for a small group of people?"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"This is where  enters the story. "}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"The Celeste has started its journey as one of the "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"link","attrs":{"href":"https://thecelestebd.com/","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener noreferrer nofollow","class":null,"title":null}},{"type":"bold"}],"text":"science-backed skincare brand in Bangladesh"},{"type":"text","text":". It has a vision of affordable skincare for everyone. This journey is more than just launching products. It is about challenging skincare-based inequality and breaking price barriers. And building a society where quality skincare for all will be assured."},{"type":"hardBreak"},{"type":"text","text":"The Beginning of a Vision: Building a Science-Backed Skincare Brand in Bangladesh"}]},{"type":"image","attrs":{"src":"https://res.cloudinary.com/dakq6amg8/image/upload/v1781701665/admin/blog/sjt9wp4fim2yuwj3pul1.webp","alt":null,"title":null,"width":null,"height":null}},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null}}]}

blogs.title: How to build an affordable natural skincare routine
blogs.content: {"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"n today's world, where the beauty industry offers a plethora of expensive skincare products, building a natural skincare routine, where less really is more, can help you achieve healthy and radiant skin that doesn't have to break the piggy bank."}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Let me guide you through the simple process of building that effective and budget-friendly natural skincare routine that will leave your skin glowing and have you telling all your friends."}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":" "}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"textAlign":null,"level":2},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"1. Get to know your skin type and skin goals"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"The first step in any natural skincare routine is to understand your skin type and its specific needs. This knowledge will help you select the right natural products and ingredients for your skin type. Whether you have oily, dry, sensitive, or combination skin, identifying your skin type allows you to tailor your routine accordingly and avoid unnecessary expenses on products that may not work for you."}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"textAlign":null,"level":2},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"2. Simplify Your Routine"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Building an affordable, natural skincare routine begins with simplicity, as I have already said, less really is more when it comes to skincare. Avoid succumbing for the allure of multiple expensive products and focus on a few key essentials that address your skin's needs. A minimalistic routine can be just as effective as an extensive one. testimonials.name: Farhana Akter
testimonials.text: Excellent product! It absorbs quickly and doesn't feel oily. My dark spots have faded significantly and my skin looks more radiant.

testimonials.text: I’m really impressed with the results after using Radiate Serum daily. My skin feels deeply hydrated, looks more even-toned, and I’ve started getting compliments on how fresh and glowing my face looks.

campaignFaqs.question: কতদিন ব্যবহার করলে ফল পাওয়া যায়?
campaignFaqs.answer: সাধারণত নিয়মিত ব্যবহার করলে ২–৪ সপ্তাহের মধ্যে পরিবর্তন দেখা যেতে পারে। তবে ত্বকের ধরন অনুযায়ী সময় ভিন্ন হতে পারে।

campaignFaqs.question: দিনে কয়বার ব্যবহার করবেন?
campaignFaqs.answer: প্রতিদিন ১–২ বার (সকাল ও রাতে) পরিষ্কার ত্বকে ব্যবহার করা ভালো।

campaignFaqs.question: Sensitive Skin এ ব্যবহার করা যাবে?
campaignFaqs.answer: হ্যাঁ, সাধারণত ব্যবহার করা যায়। তবে প্রথমে Patch Test করে নেওয়া ভালো। যদি জ্বালাপোড়া বা অস্বস্তি হয়, ব্যবহার বন্ধ করুন।

campaignFaqs.question: Pregnant বা Lactating অবস্থায় ব্যবহার করা যাবে?
campaignFaqs.answer: যদি প্রোডাক্টে শক্তিশালী Active Ingredients থাকে, তাহলে ব্যবহার করার আগে ডাক্তারের পরামর্শ নেওয়া উচিত।

campaignFaqs.question: Sunscreen ব্যবহার করা কি জরুরি?
campaignFaqs.answer: হ্যাঁ, বিশেষ করে দিনে ব্যবহার করলে SPF 30 বা তার বেশি Sunscreen ব্যবহার করা জরুরি। এটি ত্বককে সূর্যের ক্ষতি থেকে রক্ষা করে।

campaignFaqs.question: Side Effect আছে কি?
campaignFaqs.answer: সাধারণত সঠিকভাবে ব্যবহার করলে Side Effect হয় না। তবে কারও কারও ক্ষেত্রে হালকা শুষ্কতা, লালচে ভাব বা irritation হতে পারে।
